title: rubus reptans
intro: Rubus reptans, also known as Creeping Raspberry or Creeping Bramble, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus reptans include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Rubus reptans can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
